name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
description: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction.

name: Dark Magician
description: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

name: Red-Eyes Black Dragon
description: A ferocious dragon with a deadly attack.

name: Kuriboh
description: Discard this card from your hand. Make the battle damage you take from an opponent's monster 0.

name: Celtic Guardian
description: An elf who learned to wield a sword, he baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.

name: Monster Reborn
description: Target 1 monster in either GY; Special Summon it.

name: Mirror Force
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Destroy all your opponent's Attack Position monsters.

name: Exodia the Forbidden One
description: If you have all 5 pieces, you win the duel.

name: Mystical Space Typhoon
description: Target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.

name: Time Wizard
description: Toss a coin and call it. If you call it right, destroy all monsters your opponent controls.

name: Slifer the Sky Dragon
description: The heavens twist and thunder roars, signaling the coming of this ancient creature.

name: Obelisk the Tormentor
description: The descent of this mighty creature shall be heralded by burning winds and twisted land.

name: The Winged Dragon of Ra
description: Spirits sing of a powerful creature that rules over all that is mystic.

name: Polymerization
description: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material.

name: Pot of Greed
description: Draw 2 cards.

name: Jinzo
description: Trap Cards, and their effects on the field, cannot be activated. Negate all Trap effects on the field.

name: Buster Blader
description: Gains 500 ATK for each Dragon monster your opponent controls or is in their GY.

name: Harpie Lady
description: This human-shaped animal with wings is beautiful to watch but deadly in battle.

name: Black Luster Soldier
description: You can Ritual Summon this card with 'Black Luster Ritual'.

name: Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon
description: 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon' + 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon' + 'Blue-Eyes White Dragon'

name: Stardust Dragon
description: 1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters. When a card or effect is activated that would destroy a card(s) on the field (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Number 39: Utopia
description: 2 Level 4 monsters. When any player's monster declares an attack: You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the attack.

name: Odd-Eyes Pendulum Dragon
description: If this card battles an opponent's monster, any battle damage this card inflicts to your opponent is doubled.

name: Decode Talker
description: 2+ Effect Monsters. Gains 500 ATK for each monster it points to.

name: Dark Magician Girl
description: Gains 300 ATK for every "Dark Magician" or "Magician of Black Chaos" in the GYs.

name: Summoned Skull
description: A fiend with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the Fiend-Type monsters, this monster boasts considerable force.

name: Black Luster Soldier - Envoy of the Beginning
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT and 1 DARK monster from your GY. Once per turn, you can target 1 monster on the field; banish it.

name: Chaos Emperor Dragon - Envoy of the End
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT and 1 DARK monster from your GY. You can pay 1000 LP; send all cards in both players' hands and on the field to the GY.

name: Relinquished
description: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Black Illusion Ritual". Once per turn: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; equip that target to this card.

name: Cyber Dragon
description: If only your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand).

name: Elemental HERO Flame Wingman
description: "Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix". Must be Fusion Summoned. When this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the ATK of the destroyed monster.

name: Magician of Black Chaos
description: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Black Magic Ritual".

name: Giant Soldier of Stone
description: A giant warrior made of stone. A punch from this creature has earth-shattering results.

name: Sangan
description: If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck to your hand.

name: Man-Eater Bug
description: FLIP: Target 1 monster on the field; destroy that target.

name: Mystical Elf
description: A delicate elf that lacks offense, but has a terrific defense backed by mystical power.

name: Silver Fang
description: A snow wolf that's beautiful to the eye, but absolutely vicious in battle.

name: Trap Hole
description: When your opponent Normal or Flip Summons a monster with 1000 or more ATK: Target that monster; destroy that target.

name: Fissure
description: Destroy the 1 face-up monster your opponent controls that has the lowest ATK (your choice, if tied).

name: Waboku
description: You take no battle damage from your opponent's monsters this turn. Your monsters cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.

name: Dian Keto the Cure Master
description: Gain 1000 LP.

name: Magician of Faith
description: FLIP: Target 1 Spell in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: Penguin Soldier
description: FLIP: You can target up to 2 monsters on the field; return those targets to the hand.

name: Dark Hole
description: Destroy all monsters on the field.

name: Swords of Revealing Light
description: After this card's activation, it remains on the field, but you must destroy it during the End Phase of your opponent's 3rd turn. When this card resolves, change all face-down monsters your opponent controls to face-up. Monsters your opponent controls cannot declare an attack.

name: Call of the Haunted
description: Target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Attack Position. When this card leaves the field, destroy that target. When that target is destroyed, destroy this card.

name: Cyber Jar
description: FLIP: Destroy all monsters on the field, then both players reveal the top 5 cards of their Decks, then Special Summon all revealed Level 4 or lower monsters in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position, also add any remaining cards to their hand.

name: Heavy Storm
description: Destroy all Spells and Traps on the field.

name: Premature Burial
description: Pay 800 LP, then target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Attack Position and equip it with this card. When this card is destroyed, destroy the equipped monster.

name: Magic Cylinder
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its ATK.

name: Left Arm of the Forbidden One
description: A forbidden left arm sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.

name: Right Arm of the Forbidden One
description: A forbidden right arm sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.

name: Left Leg of the Forbidden One
description: A forbidden left leg sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.

name: Right Leg of the Forbidden One
description: A forbidden right leg sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.
